---
title: "Andrew Rubenbauer: Sustainable Agriculture--From the Agricultural Revolution to the Dust Bowl to Today"
description: "Andrew will also share his experiences as sustainability operations manager at Dairy Farmers of America, a national dairy cooperative."
image: /files/headshots/andrew-rubenbauer.webp
author: "Climate Guest Speakers"
date: "2026-03-02"
categories: [Climate and Sustainability, Climate and Agriculture]
#page-layout: full
#bibliography: references.bib
#csl: chicago-syllabus.csl
#suppress-bibliography: true
#link-citations: false
#citations-hover: false
listing:  #an example of listing external links
#  template: item-default-external.ejs
- id: speaker
  sort: "date asc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle]
  grid-item-align: center
  grid-columns: 2
  image-height: 350px
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents:
    - path: https://www.linkedin.com/in/andrewrubenbauer/ #linkedin profile or personal website
      image: /files/headshots/andrew-rubenbauer.webp
      title: "Andrew Rubenbauer"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Sustainability Operations, Dairy Farmers of America"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
#toc: false
---

## Title

{{< meta title >}}

### Time

{{< meta date >}}  

6:00PM - 7:00PM ET

### Venue 
Online via Zoom. Please [register](https://baruch.zoom.us/meeting/register/ZvRnp4MmTHSyn4DRzAr3sw) to participate.

## About

Andrew will first share his personal experiences from Iowa, where he grew up on a farm, and now as sustainability operations manager at Dairy Farmers of America, a national dairy cooperative. He will then discuss the history of sustainable agriculture, from the Agricultural Revolution to the Dust Bowl to today. He will also share his ground insights on the challenges and opportunities of climate mitigation and adaptation in sustainable agriculture in the 21st century.


## Speaker

:::{#speaker}
:::


### Bio

Andrew Rubenbauer is the Sustainability Operations Manager at Dairy Farmers of America. He received his MPA from Baruch College, and was a Climate Corps fellow of the Environmental Defense Fund.


## Readings

- Sinclair, Upton. 1905. The Jungle. CreateSpace Independent Publishing Platform.
- Steinbeck, John, and Robert DeMott. 1939. The Grapes of Wrath. Penguin Classics.
- Carson, Rachel. 1962. Silent Spring. Houghton, Mifflin and Company.




<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
